allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\) if obj.get\(''type''\) == ''user'': print\(''USER:'', json.dumps\(obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''content'', ''''\)\)[:500]\) elif obj.get\(''type''\) == ''assistant'': content = obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''content'', []\) for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': print\(''ASSISTANT TEXT:'', c[''text''][:500]\) elif isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\(''type''\) == ''tool_use'': print\(''TOOL USE:'', c.get\(''name'', ''''\), json.dumps\(c.get\(''input'', {}\)\)[:300]\) except: pass ")
